content: To calculate the resonance frequency of your surgical scheduling grid, model the schedule as a periodic function with period \(T\) (e.g., one week), then analyze the timing offsets between ortho and general surgery blocks as phase differences; shifting one block by 30 minutes changes the phase and can move you off the resonance peak if it disrupts the constructive alignment at the fundamental frequency \(f = \frac{1}{T}\) or its harmonics.
